mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_spu WHERE status = 'on_sale'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales_order WHERE status = 'PAID'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM after_sale_request WHERE status IN ('REQUESTED', 'PENDING', 'APPROVED')
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM sales_order WHERE status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED')
mapper.sql: p.id AS spu_id, p.spu_code, p.name, p.category_id, c.name AS category_name, p.main_image_url, MIN(s.sale_price) AS min_price, MAX(s.sale_price) AS max_price, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS sku_count, COALESCE(SUM(i.available_stock), 0) AS total_stock, p.status, p.created_at, p.description
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM product_spu p JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN product_sku s ON s.spu_id = p.id LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.sku_id = s.id GROUP BY p.id, p.spu_code, p.name, p.category_id, c.name, p.main_image_url, p.status, p.created_at, p.description ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT
FROM product_spu p JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN product_sku s ON s.spu_id = p.id LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.sku_id = s.id WHERE p.id = #{spuId} GROUP BY p.id, p.spu_code, p.name, p.category_id, c.name, p.main_image_url, p.status, p.created_at, p.description
